findings.description: No agent profile selector in chat interface
findings.expected: A profile selector or dropdown should be available to link a profile to a session
findings.actual: Only model selector (Sonnet 4.6) and mode selector (Normal) are present

findings.description: No profile badges or indicators on session entries in sidebar
findings.expected: Sessions linked to profiles should show a profile badge/indicator
findings.actual: Session entries show only plain text name

findings.description: Agent Profiles nav button does not navigate to a profiles page
findings.expected: Clicking Agent Profiles should show a profiles management page
findings.actual: Main content area remains unchanged after clicking

findings.description: No option to link/assign profile in session context menu
findings.expected: Context menu should include option to assign/change agent profile
findings.actual: Context menu only has: Rename, Fork, Export JSON, Export Markdown, Delete
